name: flashnote
description: 轻量级速记应用：全局快捷键快闪记录灵感与 todo

scripts.install:macos: test "$(uname)" = Darwin || exit 0; osascript -e 'quit app "FlashNote"' 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; rm -rf /Applications/FlashNote.app && ditto src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/FlashNote.app /Applications/FlashNote.app && xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/FlashNote.app
